title: Unforgettable Mediterranean Buckwheat Flatbread
description: Savory, molten flatbread with an olive tapenade heart, smoked paprika, and herbs, baked to crispy perfection in a single pan.
instructions: In a medium bowl whisk together buckwheat flour, sea salt, smoked paprika, oregano, thyme, and black pepper.
Add olive oil to the dry mix and stir until crumbly crumbs form.
Pour in the vegetable broth a little at a time, stirring until a smooth dough forms.
Transfer the dough to a lightly oiled baking sheet and press it into a 6-inch round flatbread, about 1/4 inch thick.
Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes, or until edges are golden.
Spread olive tapenade evenly across the dough, then bake another 5 minutes until the tapenade bubbles and the flatbread feels melty.
Remove from oven, let cool a minute, then slice into four wedges.
Serve warm for a smoky, Mediterranean snack that melts on your tongue.
